creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-08-09 04:52:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/rubygem-sys-filesystem Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  The sys-filesystem library provides an interface
  for gathering filesystem information, such as
  disk space and mount point data.
  
  WWW: http://sysutils.rubyforge.org/
  
  PR:             ports/149382
  Submitted by:   Eric Freeman <freebsdports at chillibear.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1211    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/sysutils/rubygem-sys-filesystem/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/rubygem-sys-filesystem/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/rubygem-sys-filesystem/pkg-descr (new)
